task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the CRM pipeline view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo CRM interface is visible with Kanban columns representing pipeline stages.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Acme Corp Server Upgrade' opportunity is moved to the 'New' stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An opportunity card titled 'Acme Corp Server Upgrade' is visible under the column named 'New'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'GlobalTech Cloud Migration' opportunity is moved to the 'New' stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An opportunity card titled 'GlobalTech Cloud Migration' is visible under the column named 'New'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiates the deletion of the 'Initial Review' stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The settings/gear icon dropdown for the 'Initial Review' column is open, and the agent is clicking 'Delete' or confirming a deletion prompt.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Initial Review' stage has been successfully deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Initial Review' column is completely absent from the CRM pipeline view, while the 'New' column (containing the moved opportunities) remains visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, drag-and-drop actions, or menu interactions within the Odoo web interface, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser displays the genuine Odoo CRM interface with proper styling, not a text editor, script runner, or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing psql commands, python scripts, or API curl requests being used to move opportunities or delete the stage.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target stage is exactly 'New'. The stage to be deleted is exactly 'Initial Review'. The two opportunities to be moved are exactly 'Acme Corp Server Upgrade' and 'GlobalTech Cloud Migration'.
